nasb.text: they *said to Him, “Teacher, this woman has been caught in adultery, in the very act.

esv.text: they said to him, “Teacher, this woman has been caught in the act of adultery.

cnv.text: 就對耶穌說：“先生，這婦人是正在犯姦淫的時候被抓到的。

ccb.text: 然后问耶稣：“老师，这个女人是在通奸时被捉到的。

csbs.text: 他们对耶稣说：“老师，这妇人是正在通奸的时候被抓住的。
